The '''ZX-26 airspeeder''' was a model of [[Airspeeder/Legends|airspeeder]] that was manufactured by [[Incom Corporation/Legends|Incom Corporation]]. [[Nyche/Legends|Nyche]] preferred them to the "flashier" [[ZRX-29 airspeeder|ZRX-29s]].

==Appearances==
*''[[I, Jedi]]'' {{Ab|I, Jedi (unabridged audiobook)}}
